signup.title: Create your account
signup.subtitle: Sign up to start checkout and manage your Lootify profile.

verifyEmail.title: Verify your email
verifyEmail.subtitle: Enter the 6-digit code sent to {email}.
verifyEmail.resendSuccess: A new verification code has been sent.

login.title: Sign in
login.subtitle: Access your Lootify account to continue checkout.
login.verified: Your email has been verified. Please sign in.

profile.signinRequired: You need to sign in to view your profile.
profile.title: My Profile
profile.subtitle: Your account details and recent activity snapshot.

settings.signinRequired: You need to sign in to update account settings.
settings.title: Account Settings
settings.subtitle: Update your display name, contact information, and other profile details.
settings.emailNote: Email address cannot be changed in this version.

checkout.title: Secure Checkout
checkout.subtitle: Review your item details before continuing.
checkout.unexpectedError: Something went wrong. Please try again.
checkout.paymentNote: Your payment will not be processed until you proceed.

paymentMock.title: Payment Gateway Not Yet Live
paymentMock.line1: Your checkout session has been created successfully.
paymentMock.line2: The payment gateway is currently in test mode and has not been enabled yet.
paymentMock.line3: This flow is ready for future live payment integration.

lifai.landingTitle: Sell EP and settle in USDT
lifai.landingBody: LIFAI lets you submit an EP sell request, review the payout plan, send EP to the platform wallet, and receive USDT to your own wallet after verification.

cards.planBody: Choose the payout plan that matches your volume and confirm the fee and estimated USDT rate before submitting.
cards.transferBody: After the request is approved, send the exact EP amount to the designated LIFAI platform wallet number.
cards.payoutBody: Once the transfer is verified, USDT is released to the wallet address you specified in the request.

lifai.walletHint: Only transfer EP after your sell request is submitted and the plan details are confirmed.
lifai.acceptedNetworks: Supported payout networks: TRC20, ERC20, BEP20
lifai.sellSubtitle: Confirm your plan, enter the EP transfer details, and choose the USDT destination wallet that should receive your payout.

starter.name: Starter
starter.desc: Best for first-time or low-volume sellers. (4 EP = ¥1)

builder.name: Builder
builder.desc: Balanced plan for recurring EP sellers. (3.5 EP = ¥1)

automation.name: Automation
automation.desc: Efficient plan for active sellers. (3 EP = ¥1)

core.name: Core
core.desc: Core-level plan for serious sellers. (2.5 EP = ¥1)

infra.name: Infra
infra.desc: Top-tier plan for high-volume members. (2 EP = ¥1)

lifai.walletPersonalNote: Send your EP to this address
lifai.submitSuccess: Request ID: {id} — A staff member will review and confirm.
lifai.submitError: Submission failed. Please try again shortly.
lifai.planConfirmed: I reviewed the selected plan, fee, and estimated payout before submitting.
lifai.transferConfirmed: I understand that I must send the exact EP amount to the LIFAI platform wallet after the request is confirmed.
lifai.walletConfirmed: I confirm that the payout wallet belongs to me and can receive USDT on the selected network.

steps.1: Submit the sell request and check your personal wallet address (LFW-XXXXXX).
steps.2: Use the 'Send to LFW' feature in aisalon to transfer EP to the displayed address.
steps.3: Lootify automatically verifies the EP deposit (may take a few minutes).
steps.4: Once confirmed, USDT is sent to your designated payout wallet.

lifai.warningBody:
• EP transfers are final and non-refundable under any circumstances. Treat them like cryptocurrency transactions.
• Deposit confirmation may take a few minutes. Do not close the page until confirmation is complete.
• Transfers to incorrect addresses or amounts that differ from your request are not covered.
lifai.sendEpInstruction: On the LIFAIOV GiftEP send page, enter the address below as the recipient.
lifai.payoutWalletError: Please enter your USDT payout wallet address.
lifai.depositConfirmed: ✓ EP deposit confirmed. USDT transfer will be initiated.
lifai.depositTimeout: Deposit confirmation timed out. If you already sent EP, please contact support.
lifai.confirmError: You must confirm the plan and transfer acknowledgements before submitting.
lifai.epMinimumError: The minimum sell request is 100 EP.
lifai.openRequestExists: You already have an unfinished sell request. Please complete its deposit first — see the request history in your profile.
lifai.depositInsufficient: ⚠ Insufficient deposit: received {received} EP / {shortfall} EP short. Please send the remaining {shortfall} EP to the same address.
lifai.depositOverpaid: We received {overpaid} EP more than requested. The excess has been accepted as part of this request.

hero.title: The Fastest Way to Trade Game Items
hero.body: Lootify helps buyers and sellers trade game items with a simple flow, secure checkout, and clear delivery steps. Browse listings, place an order, and coordinate delivery without leaving the marketplace.

steps.title: Browse
steps.body: Choose a game and compare available listings from active sellers.

steps.title: Purchase
steps.body: Complete checkout through a guided order flow with clear pricing.

steps.title: Receive
steps.body: Coordinate with the seller and receive your item after the order is confirmed.

steps.title: Create Your Account
steps.body: Register with your email address so you can manage purchases and receive order updates.

steps.title: Browse Game Listings
steps.body: Filter by category and game title, then compare price, delivery timing, and seller details.

steps.title: Place Your Order
steps.body: Review the item, confirm the total, and continue through the checkout flow.

steps.title: Receive Your Item
steps.body: Follow the delivery instructions and coordinate with the seller until the trade is complete.

sellers.title: Turn Your Game Assets Into Cash

steps.title: Create Your Account
steps.body: Use the same account flow to prepare your seller profile and manage future listings.

steps.title: List Your Item
steps.body: Add the title, price, item details, and delivery notes buyers need before purchasing.

steps.title: Get Purchased
steps.body: Receive order details when a buyer checks out and prepare the item for delivery.

steps.title: Deliver & Get Paid
steps.body: Deliver the item, complete the order confirmation, and track your settlement status.

cards.title: Secure Payments
cards.body: Checkout is designed around clear order records and protected payment handling.

cards.title: Fast Delivery
cards.body: Many listings can be delivered quickly once buyer and seller details are confirmed.

cards.title: Verified Listings
cards.body: Listings surface seller details and trading context so buyers can choose with confidence.

items.title: What payment methods are accepted?
items.body: Available payment methods are shown during checkout before you confirm the order.

items.title: Is it safe to trade on Lootify?
items.body: Lootify keeps the trade inside a structured order flow with clear records and support paths.

items.title: How long does delivery take?
items.body: Delivery depends on the game and seller, but many orders are completed the same day.

items.title: What if I have a problem with my order?
items.body: Contact support with your order details so the issue can be reviewed and resolved.

items.title: How do sellers get paid?
items.body: Seller payout is processed after the delivery and order confirmation steps are completed.

cta.title: Ready to Get Started?
cta.body: Find your next game item or create a free account to start selling through Lootify.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.subtitle: Use this form for order, seller, account, or general questions. Our team will review the details and follow up as needed.
contact.formSubtitle: Fill in the details below and submit your inquiry.
contact.note: Including your order ID, game title, and a clear description of the issue will help us review your inquiry faster.

success.title: Your inquiry has been recorded
success.body: Your inquiry has been received. We will review the details and follow up when needed.

cards.responseBody: Inquiries are reviewed in order, and follow-up is provided when needed.
cards.includeBody: Order ID, game title, what happened, and what you want reviewed will make the inquiry easier to handle.
cards.scopeBody: Order trouble, listing questions, account issues, and general marketplace inquiries are all supported.
